creator: tonymaher@optusnet.com.au
text:
Hello,

the one port I always have trouble with is enigmail :-(
After a few hours of trying to get this working (which from my
experience is nothing unusual) I came across this PR.
I set USE_GCC=3.4 in thunderbird and enigmail-thunderbird
but still not luck (removed .thunderbird directory just to be sure.)
It installs but does not actually work.

If no-one has a solution it may be good idea to mark as broken on
amd64 an avoid

-- 
Tony Maher                    email: tonymaher@optusnet.com.au
